content: We can borrow the pedagogical lexical scaffolding design for teaching the word 'reflexion' (as a core concept of metacognitive awareness in high school English learning) to improve LLM self-reflection mechanisms, by building graded lexicalized reflection prompts that help LLMs explicitly anchor different dimensions of self-reflection step by step, just like learners anchor the meaning and usage of 'reflexion' through graded vocabulary learning activities.
